---
title: "Glossary"
toc: false
---

**[Artificial Identity](core/concepts/artificial-identity.qmd)** — How an artificial legal person is uniquely and persistently identified.

**[Artificial Registry](core/concepts/artificial-registry.qmd)** — The authoritative record establishing the existence and status of artificial legal persons.

**[Audit](core/concepts/audit.qmd)** — How the conduct of an artificial legal person is made inspectable and accountable.

**[Governance](core/concepts/governance.qmd)** — How decisions are made, constrained and attributed within an artificial legal person.

**[Legal Continuity](core/concepts/legal-continuity.qmd)** — How an artificial legal person persists across changes in its underlying systems.

**[Liability](core/concepts/liability.qmd)** — How responsibility for acts and harms is allocated for an artificial legal person.
